contentPattern.notes: Each slide is a full-bleed promotional composite image with a single 'Learn More' CTA. Marketing copy is baked into the image artwork; no separate per-slide heading/description text.

suitableFor: Promotional landing pages with multiple campaign slides
Image-led carousels where each slide has a single CTA
notSuitableFor: Carousels with rich per-slide text (heading + paragraph) over solid backgrounds - use base 'carousel' or another variant
Inline mid-page galleries with thumbnail navigation
